issues.title: Rudolph Beacon — Positron Benchmark: Phase 15 Final Gates

phase14EvidenceAudit.finding: Review comments audit missed 2 CodeRabbit reviews with 8 unresolved comments

warnings: Remote CI shows FAILURE due to pre-existing stale lockfile (advisory-only per project policy)
8 unresolved CodeRabbit comments (3 code + 5 docs — all advisory, not blocking)
No human reviewers requested — best practice recommends human review before merge

Merge requires separate explicit Owner approval

whatWorks: All local gates green: build, typecheck, diff check, 1853/1853 tests
PR #295 is OPEN, Ready for Review, MERGEABLE with no conflicts
CodeRabbit status check is SUCCESS (not blocking)
No secrets, no .env contents, no merge conflicts
whatDoesNotWork: Remote CI fails due to pre-existing stale lockfile (advisory-only)

newCapabilities: Phase-14 evidence comprehensively audited — review data inaccuracy discovered and documented

Complete final merge readiness assessment with corrected review data
Owner decision package with 4 clear options including Fix+Merge path
removedBlockers: Phase-14 review audit inaccuracy — corrected in Phase 15

unchangedLimitations: No merge without separate explicit Owner approval
Remote CI is ADVISORY_ONLY per project policy
No full real-mode without Owner approval

remainingRisks: No human review performed — best practice risk

capabilityDelta.nextBestStep: Owner decides: Option D (Fix CodeRabbit comments + lockfile, then merge), Option B (request reviewers, then merge), or Option C (merge directly).
